categories.title: Engineering & CAD
categories.description: Mechanical engineering tools I use full-time

items.name: SolidWorks
items.detail: 3D CAD modeling for machine parts, assemblies, and plant layouts. Primary design tool for mechanical engineering work.

items.name: Vectric Aspire
items.detail: CNC routing and carving software. Used for toolpath generation, 3D relief modeling, and CNC job preparation.

items.name: DXF / G-Code
items.detail: Design exchange format files and G-Code programming for CNC machines. Daily workflow for machining operations.

items.name: CNC Machines
items.detail: Operating and programming CNC routers, lathes, and mills for precision manufacturing at the rice processing plant.

items.name: HP Elitebook 840 G5
items.detail: Intel i5 8th Gen, 16GB RAM, 256GB SSD - Reliable workhorse for development and multitasking.

items.name: ASUS 24" Monitor × 2
items.detail: Dual monitor setup for productivity. Code on one screen, browser/terminal on the other.

items.name: Mechanical Keyboard
items.detail: Because the click-clack helps you think. Cherry MX switches.

items.name: Logitech Mouse
items.detail: Wireless, ergonomic, gets the job done without wrist pain.

items.name: VS Code
items.detail: Primary editor. Extensions: GitHub Copilot, ESLint, Prettier, Tailwind IntelliSense, GitLens.

items.name: Terminal - Zsh + Oh My Zsh
items.detail: Custom prompt with Powerlevel10k theme. Aliases and functions for faster workflow.

items.name: Ubuntu / WSL
items.detail: Linux-first development environment. Ubuntu as primary OS or via WSL on Windows.

items.name: Docker
items.detail: Containerized development and deployment. Docker Compose for multi-service setups.

items.name: GitHub
items.detail: Version control, CI/CD with GitHub Actions, project management with Issues and Projects.

items.name: Postman
items.detail: API testing and documentation. Collections shared across the team.

items.name: Chrome DevTools
items.detail: Network inspection, performance profiling, Lighthouse audits.

items.name: Notion
items.detail: Project planning, documentation, personal knowledge base. The second brain.

items.name: Figma
items.detail: UI/UX prototyping and design collaboration when needed.

items.name: Slack
items.detail: Team communication. Channels organized by project and topic.

items.name: Spotify
items.detail: Lo-fi beats, deep focus playlists, and the occasional nasheeds for coding sessions.
